text:
Definition of al - mashlahah according to al - Bûthî is: Something useful according to al - Shâri ‘ (Allah and His Messenger) for the benefit of His servants. It keeps religion, life, intellect, lineage, and property, following the exact steps set in the maintenance category. Also al - Bûthî says that al - mashlahah can be used as a source of law if it meets five criteria he calls al -mashlahah Dlawâbith. These five criteria are:

(a) Maslahah should be included in the scope of al - maqashid al - Syar’iyyah.

(b) Maslahah must not go against the Qur’an.

(c) Maslahah must not go against al - Sunnah.

(d) Maslahah must not go against al - Qiyas.

(e) Maslahah must not go against another benefit that is higher / stronger / more important. From what I see, the main point of the book Dlawâbith mashlahah fi al - Shari’ah al - Islamiyya is this. In this paper the authors look at the criticism al - Bûthî makes of al - Thûfî on the maslahah idea. They also study how the author spreads and limits maslahah in al - Bûthî’s version. Definisi al-Mashlahah menurut al-Bûthî adalah: “Sesuatu yang bermanfaat Allah dan Rasul-Nya maksudkan al‑Syari’ untuk kepentingan hamba‑Nya. al‑Syari’ melindungi agama, jiwa, akal, keturunan, dan harta hamba‑Nya. kategori pemeliharaan mengatur urutan perlindungan tertentu. Namun al‑Bûthî menegaskan al‑Mashlahah dapat menjadi sumber hukum bila al‑Mashlahah memenuhi lima kriteria al‑Bûthî sebut Dlawâbith al‑Mashlahah. Kelima kriteria itu: maslahah harus (a) termasuk dalam lima al-Maqâshid al-Syar’iyyah, (b) tidak bertentangan dengan al-Qur’an, (c) tidak bertentangan dengan alSunnah, (d) tidak bertentangan dengan al-Qiyas, dan (e) tidak bertentangan dengan kemaslahatan lain yang lebih tinggi, lebih kuat, atau lebih penting. Bagi saya, itu intinya dari kitab Dlawâbith al-Mashlahah fi. Syarî’ah al-Islâmiyyah, namun dalam makalah ini, penulis berusaha menganalisis kritik al-Bûthî terhadap konsep maslahah al-Thûfî, disamping analisis kritis penulis terhadap pembagian maslahah dan batasannya versi al-Bûthî.
headline: Fully Human Written
prediction: We believe that this document is fully human-written
